title: エルコンドルパサー登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa enters the ring of the Twinkle
Series. Her goal? To be the strongest racer in the
world!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surrounded by strong friends like Special Week
and Grass Wonder, she works hard towards her
goal...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All so that she may one day take off for races
across the world. With a vigorous shout, El
Condor Pasa prepares to make her dreams come
true.
